title: ambrosia tomentosa
intro: Ambrosia tomentosa, also known as gumweed, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infection, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Gumweed can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
